name: vicor
tagline: Advanced Power Components for the Most Demanding Power Delivery Challenges
description: Vicor is a leading global provider of power conversion and power delivery solutions, specializing in high-density, high-efficiency DC-DC converters and power components for enterprise, industrial, automotive, and aerospace applications.
longDescription: Vicor Corporation, founded in 1981 and headquartered in Andover, Massachusetts, is a pioneer and leader in advanced power conversion technology. The company specializes in developing, manufacturing, and marketing modular power components and complete power systems that offer industry-leading power density and efficiency. Vicor's innovative product portfolio includes the Factorized Power Architecture (FPA) and proprietary ChiP (Converter housed in Package) and VI Chip modular power components. These products enable customers to achieve unprecedented levels of power system performance, miniaturization, and design flexibility. Vicor's customers include major technology companies, defense contractors, automotive manufacturers, and industrial equipment makers worldwide. The company's engineering expertise and modular approach allow rapid deployment of sophisticated power systems while minimizing design risk and time-to-market.

coreProducts.name: DC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: High-density isolated and non-isolated DC-DC converters from 1W to 2kW with industry-leading efficiency up to 98%.

coreProducts.name: VI Chip Modules
coreProducts.description: Advanced power semiconductor modules including VTM current multiplier and PRM voltage regulator modules for Factorized Power Architecture.

coreProducts.name: ChiP Modules
coreProducts.description: Converter housed in Package power modules offering the highest power density with thermal performance in compact form factors.

coreProducts.name: Power Systems
coreProducts.description: Complete power systems and development platforms enabling rapid prototyping and deployment of advanced power architectures.

industries.name: Data Centers
industries.description: High-efficiency power distribution for servers, storage, and networking infrastructure with industry-leading power density.

industries.name: Industrial
industries.description: Reliable power conversion for factory automation, test equipment, and industrial control systems.

industries.name: Automotive
industries.description: Automotive-grade power modules for EV battery management, power distribution, and charging systems.

industries.name: Aerospace & Defense
industries.description: High-reliability power conversion for military systems, satellites, and aerospace applications.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification for consistent product quality and customer satisfaction.

certifications.name: AS9100D
certifications.description: Aerospace quality management system certification for aviation and defense industry requirements.

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Automotive quality management system certification for automotive semiconductor production.

certifications.name: MIL-PRF-38534
certifications.description: Military performance specification for hybrid microelectronics for space and military applications.

seoTitle: Vicor Power Components Distributor | DC-DC Converters & Power Modules
seoDescription: Authorized Vicor distributor offering DC-DC converters, VI Chip modules, ChiP power modules, and power systems. Technical support and competitive pricing for enterprise, industrial, and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Vicor products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Vicor power conversion products. We provide genuine Vicor DC-DC converters, VI Chip modules, ChiP modules, and power systems with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures customers receive authentic products with traceability, quality assurance, and access to the latest product releases and design tools. We maintain inventory of popular Vicor products and can support both prototype quantities and high-volume production requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for Vicor product availability, pricing, and technical documentation. We can also provide samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Vicor ChiP modules?
faqs.answer: Vicor ChiP modules offer several key advantages: 1) Industry-leading power density - up to 1,000W per cubic inch; 2) Superior thermal performance - integrated thermal pads for direct heatsinking; 3) High efficiency - up to 98% peak efficiency; 4) Compact form factor - SM-ChiP packages from 9mm to 23mm height; 5) Flexible configuration - parallel operation for higher power; 6) Fast dynamic response - excellent line and load transient performance. These characteristics make ChiP modules ideal for space-constrained applications requiring high power density and efficiency.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed technical comparisons and application-specific recommendations for Vicor ChiP modules.

faqs.question: What is Vicor's Factorized Power Architecture (FPA)?
faqs.answer: Vicor's Factorized Power Architecture (FPA) separates power conversion functions into specialized modules: 1) PRM (Pronto Module) - voltage regulator providing dynamic bus voltage; 2) VTM (Voltage Transformation Module) - current multiplier providing isolated DC-DC conversion with high current output. Benefits of FPA include: Higher system efficiency by optimizing each function; Reduced power distribution losses through dynamic bus voltage; Simplified thermal management by localizing heat sources; Flexible scaling through parallel operation; Faster design cycles using modular approach. FPA enables unprecedented power system performance for demanding applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for FPA design guidance and component selection for your power system requirements.

faqs.question: How do Vicor products compare to discrete power solutions?
faqs.answer: Vicor modular power solutions offer significant advantages over discrete designs: Module advantages include: Faster design cycle - plug-and-play modules vs. custom discrete design; Higher reliability - factory-tested modules with proven performance; Design flexibility - mix and match modules for optimal solution; Lower risk - modular approach reduces design uncertainty; Thermal optimization - integrated thermal management in modules. While discrete solutions may offer lower component cost, the total cost of ownership often favors modules when considering design time, reliability, and time-to-market. Vicor modules are particularly advantageous for applications where power density, efficiency, and development speed are critical.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request a detailed comparison analysis for your specific application to evaluate Vicor modules vs. discrete solutions.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Vicor products?
faqs.answer: LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Vicor products including: Application engineering support - power architecture design, thermal analysis, and system optimization; Product selection guidance - helping choose the right modules for your specific requirements; Evaluation support - providing development tools, evaluation boards, and application notes; Simulation tools - assisting with Vicor online design tools and power simulation; Supply chain support - forecasting, inventory planning, and long-term supply agreements. Our FAE team has extensive experience with power electronics design and can provide valuable insights for optimizing your designs with Vicor products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Reach out to our technical support team for assistance with your Vicor-based design projects.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Vicor products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Vicor products vary based on product type and order quantity: Standard catalog products (popular DC-DC converters and ChiP modules): 4-8 weeks from factory; Custom or modified standard products: 8-12 weeks including special testing; High-volume production orders: 8-12 weeks with scheduled deliveries; Samples and small quantities: 1-2 weeks from distributor stock. As an authorized distributor, LiTong maintains inventory of popular Vicor products for immediate delivery. For production requirements, we recommend establishing forecasts and supply agreements to ensure continuous supply. Contact us for current lead times and inventory availability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and to discuss inventory programs for your production requirements.

faqs.question: Does Vicor offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vicor offers a comprehensive range of automotive-grade power modules qualified to AEC-Q100, AEC-Q200, and IATF 16949 standards. The automotive product portfolio includes: High-density DC-DC converters for EV battery management systems; Wide-input voltage converters for automotive power distribution; Automotive-qualified ChiP modules for demanding thermal environments; eMobility power modules for charging infrastructure. All automotive products are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities and undergo rigorous reliability testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and vibration testing. Vicor automotive products are deployed in production vehicles from leading EV manufacturers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for automotive product specifications, qualification reports, and PPAP documentation.
